name: R
description: Start R or invoke an R tool using CMD

subcommands.name: RHOME
subcommands.description: Print path to R home directory and exit

subcommands.name: CMD
subcommands.description: Invoke an R tool

subcommands.name: BATCH
subcommands.description: Batch Execution of R

args.name: infile
args.description: A file with R code to be executed

args.name: outfile
args.description: A file to which to write output. If not given, the name used is that of infile, with a possible .R extension stripped, and .Rout appended

subcommands.name: COMPILE
subcommands.description: Compile files for use with R (not available on Windows)

subcommands.name: SHLIB
subcommands.description: Compile the given source files and then link all specified object files

name: --preclean
options.description: Remove files created during a previous run

args.name: LIB
args.description: Full name for the built library

name: --dry-run
-n
options.description: Dry run; shows commands that would be used

args.name: files
args.description: The object files to be included in the shared object/DLL

subcommands.name: INSTALL
subcommands.description: Utility for installing add-on packages

name: --preclean
options.description: Remove files created during a previous run

name: --library
-l
options.description: Install packages to library tree LIB

args.name: LIB
args.description: Path to the R library tree to install to

name: --no-configure
options.description: Do not use the package's configure script

name: --no-docs
options.description: Do not install HTML, LaTeX or examples help

name: --example
options.description: Install R code for help examples

name: --fake
options.description: Do minimal install for testing purposes

name: --no-lock
options.description: Install on top of any existing installation without using a lock directory

name: --pkglock
options.description: Use a per-package lock directory (default for a single package)

name: --build
options.description: Build binaries of the installed package(s)

name: --no-R
options.description: Suppress installation of the package R code

name: --no-libs
options.description: Suppress installation of the package libs

name: --no-data
options.description: Suppress installation of the package data

name: --no-help
options.description: Suppress installation of the package help

name: --no-demo
options.description: Suppress installation of the package demo

name: --data-compress
options.description: Compression to be used for lazy-loading of data

name: --resave-data
options.description: Re-save data files as compactly as possible

name: --without-keep.source
options.description: Do not use 'keep.source' for R code

name: --staged-install
options.description: Install to a temporary directory and then move to the target directory (default)

name: --no-staged-install
options.description: Install directly to the target directory

name: --no-test-load
options.description: Skip test of loading installed package

name: --no-clean-on-error
options.description: Do not remove installed package on error

name: --merge-multiarch
options.description: Multi-arch by merging (from a single tarball only)

name: --use-vanilla
options.description: Do not read any Renviron or Rprofile files

name: --configure-args
options.description: Set arguments for the configure scripts

name: --configure-vars
options.description: Set variables for the configure scripts

name: --built-timestamp
options.description: Set timestamp for 'Built' entry in DESCRIPTION (Unix only)

args.name: STAMP
args.description: A timestamp for the build (Unix only)

name: --force-biarch
options.description: Attempt to build both architectures (Windows only)

name: --compile-both
options.description: Compile both architectures on 32-bit Windows (Windows only)

subcommands.name: REMOVE
subcommands.description: Remove add-on packages

name: --library
-l
options.description: The library tree to remove from

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Build R packages from package sources

name: --no-manual
options.description: Do not build the PDF manual

name: --resave-data
options.description: Re-save data files as compactly as possible

name: --compact-vignettes
options.description: Try to compact PDF files under 'inst/doc'

name: --compression
options.description: Type of compression to be used on tarball

name: --log
options.description: Log to file 'pkg-00build.log' when processing the pkgdir with basename 'pkg'

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Check R packages from package sources

name: --library
-lib
options.description: Library used for test installation of packages

name: --no-clean
options.description: Do not clean 'outdir' before using it

name: --no-codoc
options.description: Do not check for code/documentation mismatches

name: --no-examples
options.description: Do not run the examples in the Rd files

name: --no-tests
options.description: Do not run code in 'tests' subdirectory

name: --no-manual
options.description: Do not produce the PDF manual

name: --no-vignettes
options.description: Do not run R code in vignettes nor build outputs

name: --run-dontrun
options.description: Do run `dontrun{}` sections in the Rd files

name: --run-donttest
options.description: Do run `donttest{}` sections in the Rd files

name: --use-valgrind
options.description: Use `valgrind` when running examples, tests, vignettes

name: --install-args
options.description: Command-line args to be passed to INSTALL

args.name: args
args.description: Command-line args to be passed to INSTALL

name: --test-dir
options.description: Look in this subdirectory for test scripts

name: --no-stop-on-test-error
options.description: Do not stop running tests after first error

name: --check-subdirs
options.description: Run checks on the package subdirectories

name: --as-cran
options.description: Select customizations similar to those used by CRAN

name: --extra-arch
options.description: Do only runtime tests needed for an additional sub-architecture

name: --multiarch
options.description: Do runtime tests on all installed sub-archs

name: --no-multiarch
options.description: Do runtime tests only on the main sub-architecture

name: --force-multiarch
options.description: Run tests on all sub-archs even for packages with no compiled code

subcommands.name: LINK
subcommands.description: Perform the specified linkcmd

subcommands.name: rprof
subcommands.description: Post-process profiling information from `Rprof()`

subcommands.name: Rdconv
subcommands.description: Convert R documentation to other formats

args.name: output file
args.description: Name of the output file, '""' to use the input file without '.Rd'

name: --RdMacros
options.description: Packages from which to get Rd macros

subcommands.name: Rd2pdf
subcommands.description: Generate PDF output from R documentation files

name: --no-clean
options.description: Do not remove created temporary files

name: --no-preview
options.description: Do not preview generated PDF file

name: --force
options.description: Overwrite output file if it exists

name: --title
options.description: Set the title of the document

name: --no-description
options.description: Do not typeset the description of a package

name: --RdMacros
options.description: Packages from which to get Rd macros

args.name: files or pkgs
args.description: Rd files, or a directory with the sources of a pkg, or an installed pkg

subcommands.name: Rd2txt
subcommands.description: Convert R documentation to text

args.name: output file
args.description: Name of the output file, '""' to use the input file without '.Rd'

name: --RdMacros
options.description: Packages from which to get Rd macros

subcommands.name: Stangle
subcommands.description: A front-end for Stangle and other vignette engines

subcommands.name: Sweave
subcommands.description: A front-end for Sweave and other vignette engines

name: --clean
options.description: Remove some of the created files

args.name: Compacting method
args.description: How to compact the PDF doc

subcommands.name: Rdiff
subcommands.description: Diff R output files, discarding the R startup message

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Get the value of a basic R configure variable

name: --cppflags
options.description: Print pre-processor flags required to compile a C/C++ file as part of a front-end using R as a library

name: --ldflags
options.description: Print linker flags needed for linking a front-end against the R library

name: --all
options.description: Print names and values of all variables

subcommands.name: javareconf
subcommands.description: Detect current Java setup and update the corresponding configuration in R

name: -n
--dry-run
options.description: Perform Java detection, but don't touch any configuration files

name: -e
options.description: Same as -n but exports all detected variables and runs '<prog>'

args.name: program
args.description: Program to run or '' to use shell

subcommands.name: rtags
subcommands.description: Tag C, R, and Rd files under a directory

name: --append
-a
options.description: Append to output file (overwrites by default)

name: --verbose
-V
options.description: Echo the name of files processed

args.name: path
args.description: Directory in which files will be tagged

name: --encoding
options.description: Specify encoding to be used for stdin

name: --save
options.description: Save workspace at the end of the session

name: --no-save
options.description: Do not save workspace at the end of the session

name: --no-environ
options.description: Do not read the site and user environment files

name: --no-site-file
options.description: Do not read the site-wide Rprofile

name: --no-init-file
options.description: Do not read the user R profile

name: --restore
options.description: Do restore previously saved objects at startup

name: --no-restore-data
options.description: Do not restore previously saved objects

name: --no-restore-history
options.description: Do not restore the R history file

name: --no-readline
options.description: Do not use readline for command-line editing

name: --max-ppsize
options.description: Set max size of protect stack

name: --min-nsize
options.description: Set min number of fixed size obj's ('cons cells')

args.name: min size
args.description: Minimum number of fixed size objects

name: --min-vsize
options.description: Set vector heap minimum (in bytes or '4M' = 4 MegaB)

name: --no-echo
-s
options.description: Make R run as quietly as possible

name: --args
options.description: Skip the rest of the command line

name: -e
options.description: Execute and R expression and exit
